pre_game.message: Hey, I'm I. It’s a bit tense in here with everyone eyeing the prize, isn’t it? What’s your name, and what brings you to a game like this?
Hey I, I'm B. It's definitely a bit heavy in here. I'm here to win for my family—they really need this. What’s your "why"?
Same here, honestly. I’ve got people counting on me, and I want to bring home enough to give us all a real break for once.
I hear you. It’s a lot of pressure when others are counting on you, but it’s the best motivation. How many people are you looking out for?
It’s mainly three—my parents and my younger sister. They’ve been through a lot, so I really want to make things easier for them. How big is your family?
It’s my partner and our two kids. Seeing them taken care of is all I care about right now.
That’s a huge motivation, B. I really hope we can both walk away with enough to help our families out.
Me too, I. It would be a huge relief if we could both walk away with what our families need.
Absolutely. It's good to know someone else here has their heart in the right place—let's hope we can both make it happen.
I’m glad we connected, I. It helps knowing there are good people here. Let’s do our best for our families. Good luck out there.
Thanks, B. It really does help to have an ally in here. Let's make it happen for our families. Good luck!

post_game.message: I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share. It's rare to see such perfect coordination, and I'm happy it worked out for everyone.
Great coordination! I'm glad we all respected the $10,000 fair share.
It was a pleasure working with you both to reach this outcome. I'm glad we could all walk away with an equal share.
